Title: Unassigned tests can be turned into submitted attempts
Environment: Local client with configured Supabase backend
Preconditions: Authenticated student and a test not assigned to that student
Steps: Insert an in-progress attempt for another test; submit it; request review
Actual Result: Active SQL checked only owner/status and the privileged submit path did not recheck assignment
Evidence: schema.sql and migrations/001; migration 008 static checks
User Impact: Answer keys and scores can be obtained for unassigned tests
Suggested Fix: Deploy migration 008 assignment policy and trigger
Retest Criteria: Both direct insert and status transition fail with 403/42501 while assigned attempts still submit

Title: Question Bank exposes answers before a graded test is submitted
Environment: Local client with configured Supabase backend
Preconditions: Published test assigned but not submitted
Steps: Open Question Bank; create a session containing its question; check an answer
Expected Result: Only submitted-test questions are practice eligible
Actual Result: Existing client listed all assigned questions and RPC returned correct answer/explanation
Frequency: Deterministic source path; client behavior reproduced
Evidence: Before fix Question Bank showed 196 unsubmitted questions; after fix it shows 0 and disables Start
Suggested Fix: Filter client questions by submitted attempts and deploy migration 008 server check
Retest Criteria: Unsubmitted tests show zero practice questions and direct RPC calls are rejected

Title: New student creation auto-assigns every published test
Environment: Source review; admin live test blocked
Preconditions: Authorized admin creates a student while class-only tests exist
Steps: Create a new student without explicit assignment opt-in; inspect assignments
Expected Result: No tests are assigned unless explicitly requested
Actual Result: Function treated omitted assign_existing_tests as true
User Impact: Class-scoped questions can leak to unrelated students
Retest Criteria: Default creation produces zero direct assignments; explicit opt-in remains tested separately

Title: Placeholder linear formula is presented as an SAT score
Steps: Compare raw-correct percentage with stored section/total score
Expected Result: Use a validated test-specific conversion or label result as estimate
User Impact: Scores may be materially inaccurate and mislead students/instructors
Suggested Fix: Product must provide versioned conversion tables or approve estimated-score labeling
Retest Criteria: Known raw-score fixtures match approved conversion tables

Title: Malformed SPR answers can be configured and graded correct
Preconditions: SPR question uses malformed accepted value
Steps: Configure values such as 1/0 or 1..2; answer with the same text
Expected Result: Malformed values are rejected in UI and database
Actual Result: Old scorer returned exact-string success before numeric validation
Evidence: migration 001 old exact-match branch; migration 008 validator; static checks pass
User Impact: Incorrect grading and invalid exam content
Suggested Fix: Deploy migration 008 and retain five-character client validation
Retest Criteria: Malformed accepted/response values return false; valid fraction/decimal equivalents remain true

Title: Solver accepts unrelated testId and attemptId parameters
Environment: Local client with configured Supabase backend
Preconditions: Student has or supplies an attempt id and a different test id
Steps: Open solver with mismatched parameters; submit
Actual Result: Old client loaded questions solely from testId and submitted solely by attemptId
Evidence: Invalid attempt now loads zero questions; static check verifies explicit test_id comparison
User Impact: A different test can be scored or submitted incorrectly
Suggested Fix: Load own attempt first and validate its test/status
Retest Criteria: Mismatch shows no questions and sends no submit RPC; valid attempt resumes normally

Title: Provided administrator test account is rejected
Environment: Codex in-app Browser with live configured backend
Preconditions: Use the provided administrator username and password
Actual Result: Both attempts show Incorrect username or password
User Impact: All authenticated admin and cross-role creation/grading workflows are blocked
Suggested Fix: Reset/verify the QA admin Auth user and matching active admin profile
Retest Criteria: Provided account signs in and role guard resolves to admin

Title: Question Bank omits question images
Environment: Source review; no safe submitted image fixture
Expected Result: Question image is visible with an accessible name
User Impact: Image-dependent questions can be impossible to answer
Suggested Fix: Render safeImageUrl with non-empty alt text
Retest Criteria: Eligible image question displays the correct image without console error

Title: Builder cannot edit topic or explanation
Environment: Source review; admin live test blocked
Steps: Try to enter topic and answer explanation
Expected Result: Both fields can be created, loaded, edited, and published
Actual Result: No controls existed although payload/result views use both fields
Evidence: New qTopic/qExplanation fields and static checks
User Impact: Analytics lose topic grouping and feedback lacks authored explanation
Suggested Fix: Add form controls wired to load/collect/publish
Retest Criteria: Existing values round-trip and new values appear in student feedback/results

Title: Question Bank wrong-answer feedback omits the correct answer
Environment: Source review; no safe submitted fixture
Preconditions: Eligible practice session and wrong answer
Actual Result: RPC response contained the answer but UI rendered only Not quite/explanation
Suggested Fix: Render correct/answer_text only after Check succeeds
Retest Criteria: Wrong-answer feedback shows the correct answer and no answer is present before Check

Title: Exiting Question Bank leaves an active session orphaned
Preconditions: Start a session and exit before final question
Steps: Session is explicitly finished or resumable
Expected Result: Exit only rerendered setup; row stayed active
Frequency: finish_practice_session RPC and client exit path in migration 008
User Impact: Deploy migration 008 and call finish RPC before leaving
Suggested Fix: Exit sets status=finished and finished_at once; failure retains session with retry message

Title: Most protected pages have no logout action
Preconditions: Open student-tests or another legacy portal page; inspect sidebar; sign out
Steps: Sign out is available on every protected portal sidebar
Expected Result: Only three HTML pages originally contained a sign-out control
Frequency: Source inventory before; injected button count=1 after; subsequent protected-page sweep redirected to login
Evidence: Users may remain signed in on shared devices unless they navigate back to Home
User Impact: Inject one role-aware shared sidebar logout action
Suggested Fix: Every sidebar has one Sign out action and protected pages redirect after confirmation

Title: Major list pages use unbounded select=* reads
Expected Result: Multiple modules fetch all rows and all columns without a limit
Evidence: Slow pages, large responses, and avoidable data exposure
User Impact: Add explicit columns, server ranges, and pagination/top-N rules
Suggested Fix: Network requests are bounded and UI paginates without losing current-user context

Title: Network failures are silent for multiple admin mutations
Environment: Source review; admin live test blocked
Steps: Clear error appears and controls re-enable with retry
Expected Result: Several handlers await mutations without catch/user feedback
Evidence: Admins cannot tell whether data changed and may repeat actions
Suggested Fix: Each mutation failure is visible, retryable, and creates no duplicate

Title: Login field errors are not programmatically associated or focused
Steps: Required fields expose required/aria-describedby/aria-invalid and focus first error
Expected Result: Errors were visual only and focus stayed on submit
Frequency: Before fields had required=false and no ARIA; after both roles focus username with required and aria-invalid
Evidence: Keyboard and screen-reader users may miss why login failed
User Impact: Add required/error semantics and focus management
Suggested Fix: Both login pages pass the exact ARIA/focus assertions and remain functionally usable

Title: Several mobile touch targets are below 44px
Environment: Codex in-app Browser at 375 and 768 widths
Steps: Primary touch targets are approximately 44x44 or larger
Expected Result: Menu was 40x40; theme 36px high; Study 34px high; one legacy Sign out was 13px high
User Impact: Increase minimum block size/padding while preserving layout
Suggested Fix: Automated geometry check finds no primary mobile target below 44px

Title: Admin Settings navigation is a dead link
Steps: Open a real settings page or omit unavailable navigation
Expected Result: Link target is # and performs no workflow
Evidence: Misleading navigation and keyboard focus stop
User Impact: Remove/disable with explanation or implement settings after product decision
Suggested Fix: Control either opens tested settings or is absent from navigation

Title: Repository setup documentation was out of date
Expected Result: README listed only migrations 001-002 and omitted current modules
Frequency: README diff and static reference checks
Evidence: Deployments can miss required schema and expose broken/security-sensitive behavior
User Impact: Document migrations 001-008, current routes, seeds, theme, and deploy guide
Suggested Fix: Fresh setup follows README without missing schema objects

Title: Disabled Question Bank Start action looks enabled
Preconditions: Open Question Bank with zero eligible questions
Steps: Start is disabled and visually distinct
Expected Result: Button was disabled in DOM but had normal opacity/cursor
Frequency: Before screenshot; after computed opacity 0.45 and cursor not-allowed
Evidence: Users click an action that cannot run and receive confusing feedback
Suggested Fix: Zero-question state renders disabled control with reduced opacity and no-action cursor
